features: Get an instant fragrance boost in your home (compared to candles) with the Air Wick Essential Mist Diffuser. Delivering long-lasting fresh fragrance from an Air Freshener for up to 45 days* (*on lowest setting).
Experience this fresh scent where the softness of white cotton blossom intertwines with notes of white lotus, jasmine and neroli.
Our portable, battery-operated device diffuses fragrances infused with 2x more Natural Essential Oils into mist without any mess and gives you ultimate fragrance control with four intensity settings.
For use with Air Wick Essential Mist Diffuser
description: Air Wick Essential mist diffuser automatically transforms natural essential oils into a gentle, fragrant mist that surrounds you with a natural fragrance you will love. As the scent is gently carried through mist, feel a more natural and sensorial fragrance experience surround you. Transforms natural essential oils into a mist, thus retaining the molecular integrity of the essential oils and diffusing scent more naturally. Sleek and contemporary design and battery-operated portability lets it easily and safely fit in and even enhance your decor.
